齐才穿越到了武道昌隆的九洲大陆，觉醒了战斗就变强的系统。
他战斗，获得了无双的天赋，获得了极品的灵器。
那还有什么好说的，有机会就战斗，没机会就创造机会战斗。
他发现好像没有什么是战斗解决不了的问题，如果有那就是对手不够多，不够强。
真到了那一步，不妨试试——
跟干一下世界，看看能不能无敌。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o41fb1d8d34e050b03918534c257eefeb~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"干杯不醉","author_id":"","book_id":"7542744114635230270","book_name":"系统帮我变强，我只管战斗爽","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":514,"name":"灵气复苏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=514&name=灵气复苏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7543477255188513304","read_count":"3","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"111863"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"52","tags":"都市高武,都市,都市异能,灵气复苏,系统,穿越,无女主,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o41fb1d8d34e050b03918534c257eefeb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779392336&x-signature=awFv6zmgT2aOGjsYBH0KlaGvBnI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"92981663139","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_ite
